question: What two materials are essential for creating Sylvanian 'Grove-Cloth'?

answers.ground_truth: Sylvanian 'Grove-Cloth' is made from 'Whisper-Willow' fibers and 'Moon-Silk'.
answers.original: Sylvanian Grove-Cloth is made from fibers of the Whisper-Willow tree and Moon-Silk.
answers.perturbed: The two materials essential for creating Sylvanian 'Grove-Cloth' are Moon-Silk and the craftsmanship of the Forest-Weavers.

ops.description: The Stellar Converter is located on Xylos and is a key part of the planet's infrastructure.<SEP>The Stellar Converter is designed to capture and convert atmospheric storms on Xylos into electrical power.

entities.name: Sylvanian Grove-Cloth
entities.description: Sylvanian Grove-Cloth is a fabric made from Whisper-Willow fibers and Moon-Silk, known for its supernatural durability.

entities.name: Sylvanian Garments
entities.description: Sylvanian garments are worn by nobility across many realms.

entities.name: Forest-Weavers
entities.description: The Forest-Weavers of Sylvania are master craftspeople who create Grove-Cloth.

entities.name: Moon-Silk
entities.description: Moon-Silk is a type of silk spun by nocturnal forest spiders, possessing natural magical properties.

relations.description: Sylvanian Grove-Cloth is made from fibers of the Whisper-Willow tree.
Sylvanian garments are made from Grove-Cloth and worn by nobility.
Forest-Weavers use Moon-Silk to create Grove-Cloth.
Forest-Weavers work in the Weaving-Halls of Sylvania.
Sylvanian Grove-Cloth is woven with Moon-Silk.
